compiled_state.title: EV-4: remove REBAR_LLM_RUNNER; derive backend from config
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## What
Remove REBAR_LLM_RUNNER as a public knob. DERIVE: use the Langflow runner when LANGFLOW_URL+LANGFLOW_FLOW_ID are configured, else in-process langgraph. fake -> test-only injection via the library runner=/override= arg (off the public env surface). deepagents -> explicit experimental opt-in REBAR_LLM_EXPERIMENTAL_HARNESS=deepagents (clearly experimental).

## Files
src/rebar/llm/config.py (from_env), src/rebar/llm/runner.py (get_runner), tests/interfaces/store/test_llm_framework.py

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] REBAR_LLM_RUNNER removed; langflow auto-selected iff configured, else langgraph
- [ ] fake runner reachable only via library arg (tests updated)
- [ ] deepagents behind REBAR_LLM_EXPERIMENTAL_HARNESS; docs; full suite green

comments.body: DONE (config-loop, commit 8daeb6b5). Removed REBAR_LLM_RUNNER as a public knob; the runner is now DERIVED in LLMConfig.from_env: REBAR_LLM_EXPERIMENTAL_HARNESS=deepagents -> deepagents (explicit experimental opt-in); elif LANGFLOW_URL+LANGFLOW_FLOW_ID both set -> langflow (auto); else langgraph default. fake is test-only — off the env surface, reachable only via the library runner=/override= arg. AC1 (REBAR_LLM_RUNNER removed; langflow auto-iff-configured else langgraph): done; half-configured langflow (only URL or only FLOW_ID) correctly falls to langgraph. AC2 (fake via library only): get_runner still dispatches config.runner=="fake"; LLMConfig(runner="fake")/override=/review_ticket(runner=) all intact; the 2 CLI review tests migrated off REBAR_LLM_RUNNER=fake env to monkeypatching operations.get_runner->FakeRunner (the CLI review path get_runner call site). AC3 (deepagents behind REBAR_LLM_EXPERIMENTAL_HARNESS; docs; suite green): done; docs/llm-framework.md + docstrings updated. BONUS: get_runner now raises LLMConfigError on an unknown library runner value (naming RUNNERS) instead of silently defaulting — restores the validation the old from_env clamp provided. Tests: new test_runner_derivation_from_env (all 3 branches + knob-ignored), unknown-runner-raises, test_config_from_env asserts derived langgraph. Full offline suite green: 1968 passed; ruff check + format clean. Subagent review: ship-ready, no critical/major, derivation correct, verify gate untouched. Last EV sub-ticket under 60ce.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
